step_rationale: Pantetheinase involved in reactive oxygen species generation and inflammatory responses.
mechanism: VNN3 upregulation amplifies oxidative stress and endothelial inflammation in acute MI.

references.title: Identification of an 11 immune-related gene signature as the novel biomarker for acute myocardial infarction diagnosis.
